texto: Are decisions really products of analysis of a situation; or are simply out of preconceived notions? I believe, at some point of one's existence, we all are troubled by relativism!
explicacao: Pergunta retórica de L.D.R. que provoca temas ligados a reflexao. Ao questionar “Are decisions really products of analysis of a situation; or are simply out of preconceived notio…”, o texto convida o leitor a revisar crenças sobre reflexao, existence, decisions, com foco em reflexao.
